clusters.title: Suspect injured after police open fire during escape attempt

versions.title: Suspect injured after police open fire during escape attempt
versions.deck: A suspect has been injured after police opened fire when he allegedly attempted to escape custody while being taken to the Galgamuwa Magistrate s Court today (03). MORE..

clusters.title: Met. Dept. warns of increased lightning risk amid ongoing rainy weather

versions.title: Met. Dept. warns of increased lightning risk amid ongoing rainy weather

clusters.title: No official notice issued to Mahinda Rajapaksa over Airbus case, says spokesman

versions.title: No official notice issued to Mahinda Rajapaksa over Airbus case, says spokesman
versions.deck: Former President Mahinda Rajapaksa has not received any official notice or communication from the Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption (CIABOC) regarding the Airbus transaction, his media spokesman Attorney Manoj Gamage said. MORE..

clusters.title: 80 million deaths annually linked to tobacco use worldwide

versions.title: 80 million deaths annually linked to tobacco use worldwide
versions.deck: Nearly 80 million people die globally each year due to the use of tobacco products, the Chairperson of the National Authority on Tobacco and Alcohol (NATA), Specialist Dr. Ananda Rathnayake, has stated. MORE..

clusters.title: Two killed in suspicious Bristol house explosion in UK as major incident declared

versions.title: Two killed in suspicious Bristol house explosion in UK as major incident declared
versions.deck: Two adults have died after an explosion at a house in Sterncourt Road, Bristol, this morning, Avon and Somerset Police said. MORE..

clusters.title: Israel approves plan to buy F-35 and F-15IA fighter jets

versions.title: Israel approves plan to buy F-35 and F-15IA fighter jets
versions.deck: Israel gave final approval for a plan to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA advanced fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars, the defence ministry said on Sunday (May 3). MORE..

clusters.title: Vehicle prices expected to rise due to exchange rate and tax increases

versions.title: Fire breaks out in residential building in east Delhi, nine killed
versions.deck: At least nine people were killed after a fire broke out in a residential building in east Delhi s Vivek Vihar early Sunday (May 3, 2026), according to Delhi Fire Services officials. MORE..

clusters.title: CoPF says $ 2.5 m stolen via 10 transactions, ignoring red flags
